name: Trade AI Phoenix V2
description: Autonomous crypto trading agent powered by Darwinian Gladiator evolution, DualMasterConsciousness (GPT-4o + DeepSeek), and Omega meta-learning. Runs 4 specialized trading arenas with real-time execution on MEXC.

skills.name: Alpha Quant Arena
skills.description: Technical analysis and quantitative signals. Processes OHLCV data, indicators, and pattern recognition for LONG/SHORT/FLAT decisions.
examples: Analyze BTC/USDT for a 4h momentum trade
Generate quantitative signal for ETH with RSI + MACD

skills.name: Sentiment Arena
skills.description: Social sentiment analysis from Moltbook swarm. Aggregates bullish/bearish signals from community posts and on-chain flows.
examples: What is the current market sentiment for SOL?
Aggregate Moltbook signals for top 5 cryptos

skills.name: Risk Arena
skills.description: Position sizing, drawdown management, and SentinelGuard kill-switch evaluation. Enforces daily loss limits and win-rate thresholds.
examples: Calculate position size for a 1.5% risk trade on BTC
Evaluate current risk exposure across open positions

skills.name: Execution Arena
skills.description: Order placement and management on MEXC. Handles entry, exit, stop-loss, and phantom trade simulation.
examples: Close all open positions for ETH/USDT

skills.name: Omega Meta-Learning
skills.description: Synthesizes collective intelligence from top-3 gladiators into a global confidence modifier (0.7–1.3). Updates daily via Darwinian cycle.
examples: Get current Omega synthesis and global modifier
Which symbols have strongest collective win rate?
